notes: Adds customer-facing OrbitSM ops scripts for Windows and Linux with status, backup, verify, restore-drill, support-bundle, and guarded restore actions.
Adds DB protection status in Admin > Deploy with live database sanity checks for core tables, admin user presence, and duplicate user email detection.
Hardens database backup and restore operations with pg_dump custom-format backups, latest backup pointers, SHA256 hash files, backup manifest updates, retention, and optional off-server mirror copy.
Adds a temporary-volume restore drill so backup usability can be proven without touching the production database volume.
Adds DB resilience documentation and release gates requiring backup, sanity check, and restore-drill validation before customer-facing releases.

Includes the new ops scripts and DB resilience documentation in the repeatable Docker Hub install package while continuing to exclude secrets, cert keys, runtime logs, backups, and generated status files.
